notes: This manifest is the canonical list of automated suites for the Forseti agent tracker surfaces.
Prefer localhost/dev URLs. If production verification is required, it must be explicitly gated by the relevant tool (and documented in release evidence).
Cookie env vars: FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED, FORSETI_COOKIE_EDITOR, FORSETI_COOKIE_ADMIN.
tracker-smoke-e2e is deferred until Playwright test spec exists at tests/forseti-agent-tracker/smoke.spec.ts.

suites.label: Agent tracker environment preflight (BASE_URL reachable)
suites.command: curl -sf --max-time 5 "${FORSETI_BASE_URL:-http://localhost}/user/login" -o /dev/null && echo 'PREFLIGHT PASS: BASE_URL reachable' || (echo 'PREFLIGHT FAIL: BASE_URL not reachable — set FORSETI_BASE_URL and ensure Drupal is running' && exit 1)
suites.notes: Run this first. If it fails, all other suites will fail with connection errors. Not required_for_release because it is a gate-check, not a product test.

suites.label: Agent tracker route/ACL audit (custom module routes)
suites.notes: Validates agent tracker admin routes against live base URL. Requires FORSETI_BASE_URL pointing to a running Drupal instance. Run tracker-env-preflight first. To test admin-only routes, pass --header 'Cookie: <value-of-FORSETI_COOKIE_ADMIN>'.

suites.label: Forseti full-site audit (includes agent tracker surfaces)
suites.notes: Full-site audit covering all forseti.life routes including agent tracker surfaces. Not required_for_release here since qa-forseti owns this suite; reference only. Promote tracker-route-audit when CI env is available.

suites.label: Agent tracker core QA (ACL, API error modes, data integrity, performance)
suites.notes: 24 test cases (21 core + 3 EXTEND: csrf-forged-approve-403, upsert-dedup-1-row, hook-uninstall-tables-absent). Anon 403 accepted for all /admin/* routes (PM decision 2026-03-01, basis: qa-permissions.json admin-area rule). Token auto-fetched via drush if TELEMETRY_TOKEN not set. Admin cookie auto-fetched via drush user:login if FORSETI_COOKIE_ADMIN not set. IMPORTANT: set DRUPAL_ROOT=/var/www/html/forseti for production runs (not the dev path /home/ubuntu/forseti.life/sites/forseti which resolves a different DB).

suites.label: Agent tracker smoke e2e (Playwright — deferred)
suites.notes: Deferred: test spec file tests/forseti-agent-tracker/smoke.spec.ts does not yet exist. Promote to required_for_release once spec is created and verified. Scope: dashboard renders for admin, API POST with valid agent_id returns 200, API POST with missing agent_id returns 400.

suites.label: Agent tracker route ACL — anonymous/unpermissioned denied, admin permitted
suites.notes: AC-ACL-01: anon→dashboard 403/302. AC-ACL-02: anon→agent-detail 403/302. AC-ACL-03: authenticated user without permission→403 (skipped if FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED unset). AC-ACL-04: admin→200 + body contains copilot/agent keywords (skipped if FORSETI_COOKIE_ADMIN unset). Module: copilot_agent_tracker. Permission: administer copilot agent tracker.

suites.label: Agent tracker telemetry API contract — auth, field validation, error format
suites.command:
python3 -c "import os,sys,subprocess,json as j
base=os.environ.get('FORSETI_BASE_URL','http://localhost')
token=os.environ.get('TELEMETRY_TOKEN','test-invalid-placeholder')
api=base+'/api/copilot-agent-tracker/event'
def post(headers,body):
  cmd=['curl','--max-time','10','-s','-o','/dev/null','-w','%{http_code}','-X','POST','-H','Content-Type: application/json']
  for h in headers: cmd+=['-H',h]
  cmd+=['-d',j.dumps(body),api]
  return subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip()
def post_body(headers,body):
  cmd=['curl','--max-time','10','-s','-X','POST','-H','Content-Type: application/json']
  for h in headers: cmd+=['-H',h]
  cmd+=['-d',j.dumps(body),api]
  return subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True).stdout
failures=[]
c=post([],{'agent_id':'qa','status':'active','current_action':'test'})
print('AC-API-01 no-token:',c) or (failures.append('AC-API-01 FAIL: got '+c) if c!='403' else None)
c=post(['X-Copilot-Agent-Tracker-Token: invalid-token-value'],{'agent_id':'qa','status':'active','current_action':'test'})
print('AC-API-02 bad-token:',c) or (failures.append('AC-API-02 FAIL: got '+c) if c!='403' else None)
tok_header='X-Copilot-Agent-Tracker-Token: '+token
resp=post_body([tok_header],{'agent_id':'qa-test-api-01','status':'active','current_action':'suite-api-test'})
try:
  d=j.loads(resp)
  if 'status' not in d: failures.append('AC-API-03 FAIL: no status field in response')
  else: print('AC-API-03: PASS status=',d.get('status'))
except Exception as e: print('AC-API-03: NOTE could not parse response (module may not be implemented yet):',str(e)[:80])
c=post([tok_header],{'status':'active','current_action':'test'})
print('AC-API-04 missing-agent_id:',c) or (failures.append('AC-API-04 FAIL: got '+c) if c not in ('400','422') else None)
import random; big_payload={'agent_id':'qa','status':'active','current_action':'x'*65536}
c=post([tok_header],big_payload)
print('AC-API-05 oversized:',c) or (failures.append('AC-API-05 FAIL: got '+c) if c not in ('400','413') else None)
[print(f,file=sys.stderr) for f in failures]
sys.exit(1 if failures else 0)
"
suites.notes: AC-API-01: POST no auth header → 403. AC-API-02: POST invalid token → 403. AC-API-03: POST valid token + valid payload → 200, JSON response with 'status' field (NOTE: logs parse error if module not yet implemented, does not fail). AC-API-04: POST valid token + missing agent_id → 400 or 422. AC-API-05: POST oversized payload (current_action > 64 KB) → 400 or 413. Requires TELEMETRY_TOKEN env var; falls back to test-invalid-placeholder (AC-API-01/02 still validate).

suites.label: Agent tracker happy-path E2E — POST→DB upsert, events table, dashboard reflects
suites.notes: AC-HP-01: POST event → 1 row in copilot_agent_tracker_agents. AC-HP-02: POST same agent_id again → still 1 row (upsert). AC-HP-03: Admin GET dashboard → agent_id in response body. Skips gracefully if TELEMETRY_TOKEN not set. Requires DRUPAL_ROOT pointing to a running Drupal instance (default: /home/ubuntu/forseti.life/sites/forseti). Module must be implemented for this suite to exercise full flow; exits 0 with SKIP notes if token absent.

suites.label: Agent tracker security — auth surface, CSRF, input validation, PII/logging
suites.notes: AC-SEC-01 (traces to site.instructions.md Authentication/permission surface): auth-no-perm GET dashboard→403. Requires FORSETI_COOKIE_AUTHENTICATED. AC-SEC-02 (traces to CSRF expectations): dashboard is read-only; no admin-side POST routes; CSRF passes vacuously per OQ-1. Telemetry API uses token-auth. AC-SEC-03 (traces to Input validation requirements): oversized agent_id (80 chars)→400/422; XSS agent_id rejected or HTML-escaped in dashboard. Requires TELEMETRY_TOKEN. AC-SEC-04 (traces to PII/logging constraints): watchdog for copilot_agent_tracker type must not contain chat_log/transcript/credential fields.
